command.searchPlaceholder: Search for a page, action, client…

errorBoundary.title: An error occurred.
errorBoundary.message: Something went wrong. You can retry or reload the page.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body: Hi, I'm Limule 👋 I'll show you around KOMPTA — sales, invoices, inventory, payroll, compliance. Takes just a few minutes.

menu.title: Navigation
menu.body: Here's the side menu. Every module is one click away, and you only see what your role allows.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.body: Revenue, cash, alerts, priority tasks — all here. This is the first place to check every morning.

pos.title: Cash register
pos.body: To take a sale: products, payment, automatic receipt. I sync everything in real time.

invoice.title: Billing
invoice.body: Create your invoices, I'll chase late-paying clients and track collections for you.

stock.title: Inventory
stock.body: I watch your thresholds and movements — I'll warn you before a stockout, not after.

limule.title: Talk to me
limule.body: Ask me about your real data. I can even turn an answer into a concrete action.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Language, security, company profile, preferences — all here, and you can bring me back anytime.

clients.title: Clients
clients.body: Your client list, their purchase history, and automatic follow-ups so nothing slips through.

employees.title: Employees
employees.body: Your team's records, their roles, and generating their app access.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.body: Payslips, contributions, net pay — computed automatically from your employee records.

projects.title: Projects
projects.body: A Kanban board to track progress, tasks and deadlines on your projects.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.body: Record income and expenses. I can even transcribe a bank statement for you.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.body: Your entries, SYSCOHADA-compliant, with financial statements generated automatically.

investments.title: Investments
investments.body: Track your holdings, their yield, and your portfolio analysis.

budget.title: Budget
budget.body: Set budgets per line, I'll show you the variances in real time.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.body: Your KPIs at a glance, exportable — and I can comment on them if you'd like.

documents.title: Documents
documents.body: All your company documents, organized and findable in seconds.

declarations.title: Tax filings
declarations.body: Prepare your filings and meet your CEMAC deadlines without thinking about it.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.body: Every sensitive action is traced — for your security and compliance.

chat.title: Team channels
chat.body: Chat with your team in real time. A message can become a task in one gesture.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.body: To-do, in progress, done. You can even ask me to create a task from the chat.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.body: Meetings, tax deadlines, events — all in one place.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.body: Schedule, invite, and keep a record of your minutes.

notes.title: Notes
notes.body: Jot down quick notes, I can structure and summarize them for you.

reports.title: Reports
reports.body: Financial and HR reports, ready to export as PDF or Excel.

fiscal.title: Tax calendar
fiscal.body: No deadline missed — I'll warn you in time.

legislation.title: Legislation
legislation.body: The OHADA/CEMAC regulations that apply to your activity, within reach.

groups.title: Groups & Tontines
groups.body: Tontines, contributions, shared expenses, collective projects — built for your community.

help.title: Help & support
help.body: Tutorials, FAQ, and direct access to support if you're stuck.

outro.title: You're all set
outro.body: Back on the dashboard — this is where everything starts each day. You can bring me back anytime from Settings. Enjoy KOMPTA!

guidedTour.discoverBody: I'll show you the key modules (sales, invoices, inventory, payroll) in a few minutes.

copilot.intro:
**Hello. I am Limule — your AI strategic advisor.**

Connected in real time to your company's data, I can help with:

**🔮 Economic predictions** — revenue, cash and 30/60/90-day trend forecasts
**💰 Investment advice** — hiring, stock, expansion: I quantify impact and return
**📊 Sector analysis** — SME benchmarks, CEMAC outlook and market risks
**⚠️ TERAS risk & compliance** — alerts, score and priority corrective actions
**👥 HR & payroll costs** — costs, CNPS compliance and payroll forecasts
**📄 Professional writing** — emails, notes, clauses and letters ready to send

Ask your question — I analyze your real data to answer.
copilot.subtitle: Grand Sage V1.1 · Strategic advisor

dashboard.cashflowPrompt: As an expert CFO for Central African SMEs, provide a structured, quantified 30, 60, and 90 day cashflow forecast in English. Current data: total billed {{invoiceTotal}}, including {{invoicePaid}} collected and {{invoicePending}} pending collection, POS sales {{salesTotal}}, real cash balance {{treasuryBalance}}, headcount {{employeeCount}} (real payroll based on actual payslip history: {{estimatedPayroll}}). Include: (1) commented current cash position, (2) detailed 30-day inflow/outflow forecast, (3) pessimistic/optimistic 60-day scenario, (4) 90-day strategic recommendation with one concrete action.

helpCenter.title: KOMPTA Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: FAQ, step-by-step guides and support tickets connected to our team.
helpCenter.noResult: No results for “{{q}}”. Try another keyword or open a ticket.
helpCenter.fullDocsDesc: Find all detailed guides, the API reference and release notes in the official documentation.
helpCenter.noTicketsDesc: Need help? Open a ticket and our team will reply.
helpCenter.subject: Subject *
helpCenter.descPlaceholder: Describe the issue in detail: steps to reproduce, error message, what you expected vs what happened…
helpCenter.ticketSentDesc: Our team will reply as soon as possible.
helpCenter.tip1: Describe exactly the steps to reproduce
helpCenter.tip2: Mention the module concerned (POS, Payroll, etc.)
helpCenter.tip3: Copy the error message if applicable
helpCenter.tip4: Indicate the real severity to prioritize

faq.q: How do I create a multi-line invoice?
faq.a: In the Invoicing tab, fill in the client name then click “Add” to insert as many lines as needed. Each line has a description, quantity and unit price. The pre-tax total is calculated automatically.

faq.q: How do I record a sale at the point of sale?
faq.a: Open the Register (POS) tab, select products to add them to the cart, choose the payment method (Cash, Card, Mobile Money, Zola…) and click “Charge”. Offline, the sale is saved and synced on reconnection.

faq.q: How do I add an employee and manage their payroll?
faq.a: In the Employees tab, click “New employee” and fill in the information (name, position, contract type, gross salary). Then go to Payroll > Run a cycle to generate payslips automatically.
TERAS (Risk Evaluation and Strategic Alignment Board) is KOMPTA's local compliance engine. It analyzes your profile completeness, filing regularity and financial health to assign a score out of 100.

faq.q: How do I connect a Mobile Money or Zola account?
faq.a: In Settings > Payments, click “Add an account”. Select the provider (Zola, Airtel Money, Orange Money…), enter the masked number and enable “Use at POS” so it appears at the register.

faq.q: How do I export my sales to CSV?
faq.a: In the Register (POS) tab, the top bar offers a CSV export. Select the desired date range and click “Download CSV”.

faq.q: How do I download an invoice as PDF?
faq.a: In Invoicing, find the desired invoice and click the “PDF” button on the right. The file downloads automatically with the invoice number as filename.

faq.q: Limule / Grand Sage 1.0 is unavailable. What should I do?
faq.a: Check that the backend is running and the DeepSeek API key is configured in the .env file (DEEPSEEK_API_KEY). If the problem persists, open a support ticket — our team will assist you.

reportsHub.title: Analytics hub
reportsHub.subtitle: Financial, HR, project, compliance and CSR reports.
reportsHub.generatingRealtime: Limule is generating your report in real time…

prompts.financial: Generate a complete monthly financial report in English. Available data: Cash={{treasury}}, Revenue={{revenue}}, Payroll={{payroll}}, Active alerts={{failedChecks}}. Include P&L analysis, liquidity ratios, and operational recommendations.
prompts.hr: Generate a concise HR report in English. Latest payroll cycle: {{lastPayrollPeriod}}, {{payslipCount}} payslips. Payroll: {{payroll}}. Include headcount analysis, HR policy recommendations, and workforce risk management.
prompts.project: Generate a project steering report in English. Financial context: cash={{treasury}}, active alerts={{failedChecks}}. Include progress analysis, identified risks, and recommendations on project prioritization.
prompts.teras: Generate a detailed TERAS compliance report in English. Current score: {{terasScore}}/100. Active alerts: {{failedChecks}}. Analyze compliance risks, identify priority corrective actions, and propose a score improvement plan.
prompts.rse: Generate a CSR report in English. Include analysis of social, environmental, and governance impact. Propose CSR key performance indicators, concrete actions, and a communication plan.
prompts.evolution: Generate a consolidated English analysis of the company's evolution over 12 months. Available key metrics: TERAS={{terasScore}}/100, Cash={{treasury}}, Revenue={{revenue}}. Include trends, improvement areas, and a 3-month projection.

teras.disabledDesc: Scoring analyses and compliance alerts are paused. All existing data is preserved.
teras.title: Compliance, scoring and risk
teras.subtitle: Real-time regulatory, documentary and social control engine.
teras.runAnalysisRecs: Run a TERAS analysis to generate personalized recommendations.
teras.noOpenAlert: No open alert. Everything is in order — run an analysis to refresh the check.

dashboard.title: Your dashboard

transactions.body: Import your bank statements or add transactions manually — Limule categorizes them automatically.

employees.title: Employees
employees.body: Manage employee records, contracts and access. You can also run payroll from here.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.body: Add your products, track quantities and get alerted when stock runs low.

bankReconciliation.title: Bank reconciliation
bankReconciliation.body: Match your bank transactions with your accounting entries to keep your cash position accurate.
